nodes.text:
Intermittent episodes of abdominal discomfort and altered bowel habit affecting daily activities for 11 weeks. Additional symptoms include nocturnal symptoms. Past medical history significant for hypertension.

Imaging:
Colonoscopy: polypoidal lesion in cecum 
CT TAP: unable to identify primary tumour, no mets, Tx N0 M0
